scripts.deploy: pnpm turbo run build --filter @prisma/example-tanstack-start... && ( set -a; . "${PRISMA_DEPLOY_ENV:-../../.env}"; set +a; bun node_modules/.bin/prisma-composer deploy module.ts ${TANSTACK_START_STACK_NAME:+--name "$TANSTACK_START_STACK_NAME"} ${TANSTACK_START_STAGE:+--stage "$TANSTACK_START_STAGE"} )
scripts.destroy: ( set -a; . "${PRISMA_DEPLOY_ENV:-../../.env}"; set +a; bun node_modules/.bin/prisma-composer destroy module.ts --production ${TANSTACK_START_STACK_NAME:+--name "$TANSTACK_START_STACK_NAME"} )
scripts.destroy:stage: ( set -a; . "${PRISMA_DEPLOY_ENV:-../../.env}"; set +a; bun node_modules/.bin/prisma-composer destroy module.ts --stage "${TANSTACK_START_STAGE:?TANSTACK_START_STAGE is required}" ${TANSTACK_START_STACK_NAME:+--name "$TANSTACK_START_STACK_NAME"} )
